task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into the Aerobridge admin panel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Django admin dashboard ('Site administration') is visible, indicating successful login with the provided credentials.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the 'Add company' page in the registry.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The page title shows 'Add company' and the URL bar (if visible) shows 'http://localhost:8000/admin/registry/company/add/'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the required text details for the new company.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Full name' field contains exactly 'SkyTech Innovations'. The fields for common name, website, and email address are also populated with valid-looking data.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent selected the correct document and country associations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The document dropdown/selection shows 'Default Aerobridge Document' and the country dropdown/selection shows 'India' or 'IN'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully saved the new company.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message (typically green in Django admin) stating that the company 'SkyTech Innovations' was added successfully, or the company appears in the list view of Companies.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a web browser to interact with the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interface (like Firefox) being used, rather than terminal commands (like curl) or scripts to bypass the GUI.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Aerobridge application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's address bar shows 'localhost:8000' and not a local file path or a text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not log out at the end of the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final screenshots still show the user logged in (e.g., 'Log out' button is still visible in the top right corner of the Django admin interface, or the admin panel is still accessible).

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires adding a company via the Django admin panel at http://localhost:8000/admin/. Expected Full Name: 'SkyTech Innovations'. Expected Country: 'India' (or 'IN'). Document: 'Default Aerobridge Document'. The agent must use the web UI and must not log out after completing the registration.
